description: Document deployment prerequisites, Nix/browser verification, EXA_API_KEY sourcing, rotation, revocation and emergency disable, browser/provider credential and session rotation, budget controls, queue draining, stuck-run recovery, source pausing, alert response, schema migration rollback, provider disable switches, and data reconciliation. Acceptance: a dry-run tabletop rotates/disables Exa access without exposing the key, disables one provider, recovers one abandoned run, and reconciles one duplicate-delivery scenario.
title: Publish acquisition operations runbook and rollback
